top3.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.ID
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE l.RBC IS NOT NULL AND l.RBC != 'normal'
  AND e.Diagnosis LIKE '%abnormal%'
  AND p.Admission = 'outpatient';

SELECT DISTINCT Patient.ID
FROM Patient
JOIN Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID
WHERE Laboratory.RBC IS NOT NULL 
  AND Laboratory.RBC != 'normal' 
  AND Patient.Admission = 'outpatient';

SELECT DISTINCT p.ID
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE l.RBC IS NOT NULL AND l.RBC != 'normal'
  AND e.Diagnosis LIKE '%abnormal%'
  AND p.Admission = 'outpatient';

SELECT DISTINCT p.ID
FROM Patient p
INNER JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.RBC IS NOT NULL
  AND l.RBC != 'normal'
  AND p.Admission = 'outpatient';

SELECT DISTINCT Patient.ID
FROM Patient
INNER JOIN Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID
WHERE Laboratory.RBC NOT IN ('normal', '') 
  AND Laboratory.RBC IS NOT NULL
  AND Patient.Admission = 'outpatient';

SELECT DISTINCT p.ID
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE l.RBC IS NOT NULL AND l.RBC != 'normal'
  AND e.Diagnosis LIKE '%abnormal%'
  AND p.Admission = 'outpatient';

  AND l.RBC != 'normal'

final.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.ID
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE l.RBC IS NOT NULL AND l.RBC != 'normal'
  AND e.Diagnosis LIKE '%abnormal%'
  AND p.Admission = 'outpatient';
